title: JavaScript parser failure
description: Detects JavaScript files that contain syntax errors or cannot be properly parsed by the JavaScript parser. When the JavaScript parser fails to parse a file due to syntax errors, malformed constructs, or other parsing issues, this rule flags the file to help identify and fix the underlying problems. This enables tracking of unparseable files and assists in maintaining code quality.
recommendation: Fix syntax errors and malformed JavaScript constructs to ensure proper parsing.
impact: Prevents code analysis and may cause runtime errors

checks.message: JavaScript parser failed to parse this file
